text.title: Requirements Lifecycle Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: define-transitions
step.action: Enumerate allowed transitions; tie to triggers + owners + SLAs.

step.name: review-and-publish
step.action: Route for signoff per T3 governance.
